title: InventoryLowStock.v1
description: Inventory Service's available quantity for one SKU crossed its configured low-stock threshold. Edge-triggered: emitted once when availableQuantity drops below the threshold, and once more when it recovers back to or above it — never repeated while already on the same side of the threshold. Not tied to any order, so aggregateId is a name-based UUID derived deterministically from the SKU (UUID.nameUUIDFromBytes) rather than an order ID — the one exception to contracts/README.md's 'aggregateId is always the order ID' convention, called out there explicitly. The actual sku string travels in payload.

belowThreshold.description: true when availableQuantity just dropped below threshold, false when it just recovered to or above it.
